title: Wadleee's PVP Pack
description: A pvp resource pack made for the 1.21.8 version of Minecraft. This can be not only be used for pvp, but can also be used for SMP's, plain survival, etc.
body:
Noticing that most, if not all PVP packs are made for older versions of Minecraft, I decided to make one to use for the newest version of Minecraft, 1.21.8(atm).


# What is Wadleee's PVP Pack?
Wadleee's PVP Pack includes many reskins of items, blocks, and the user interface for style, and to give it more of a minimalistic feel. It is also designed especially for a better experience during in-game combat.

### **The Textures That I Have Reskinned Include:**

1. All Swords
2. All Pickaxes
3. All Axes
4. All Shovels
5. All Hoes
6. Fishing Rod
7. Golden Apple
8. Bow
9. Shield(_reskin_)
10. Shield(_slightly lowered for more visibility_)
11. GUI
12. All Wooden Log Types
13. Crosshair
14. Skybox
15. All Armor
16. Outlines on All Ore
17. All Wool Colours
18. Crossbow
19. Mace
20. Ender Pearl
21. Obsidian
22. End Crystal
    

# Why Get This Pack?
Going back to one of the reasons I created this pack in the first place, this pack works for the newest Minecraft version. Atleast for what I've seen, most PVP resource packs usually only work for older versions of Minecraft(which I understand because of the different PVP mechanics  for older versions, and servers that include in game combat support older versions). Since the resource pack is made to work for older versions, that means, obviously, the pack is limited to older versions of the game. This pack works as an alternative if the activities you do in game require playing on the newest Minecraft version.

This is not the only reason you may like this pack, because if you prefer something more sleek or stylish than the default Minecraft textures, this pack may be for you. There is also a black and purple, and Black and White theme I did for most of the textures that I reskinned.


# Installation Guide

Download the Pack
   
   ![Image of the download button on Modrinth](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8d473076d0b3d0af8f9b6c79346888ad7f5b37f3.png)

 Open Minecraft and go to options > Resource Packs
   
![Image indicating to the "Resource Packs" button](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/26b4d072102ac5c688e349d7e13d19bd1554af15.jpeg)

 Drag and drop into Minecraft
 
   ![Image indicating how to import a resource pack into Minecraft](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7faaffd2163d127e282d1ddf237ea35e56d283e8.jpeg)


**Please Note That You Must Use OptiFine In Order To See The Custom, Nighttime Skybox**
